raw_text: {"ranked": [{"track_id": "track_acoustic_morning", "score": 9.3, "rationale": "Slow Saturday's profile names this exact content — kettles, coffee, reading, cat b-roll; 6 slots over 4 long-take clips is a clean fit and warm tungsten matches the lighting.", "predicted_strengths": ["warm tungsten grade matches the kitchen and couch lighting", "slow pacing supports 6-7s static clips", "casual copy_tone fits 'saturday slow' hook"]}, {"track_id": "track_hiphop_lofi", "score": 8.4, "rationale": "Lofi mellow hip-hop with the same warm tungsten grade is a genuine genre-distinct top-K alternative for the same morning-routine content.", "predicted_strengths": ["distinct genre from acoustic top — adds top-K variety", "same warm tungsten grade alignment", "casual copy_tone reads naturally over quiet b-roll"]}, {"track_id": "track_cinematic_soft", "score": 7.8, "rationale": "Hushed reverent cinematic frames the morning routine as quietly intentional; works for the long-take pacing without inflating the content.", "predicted_strengths": ["reverent vibe lifts the steam and book-reading clips", "6 slots fits 4 long-take clips", "warm amber grade aligns with morning warmth"]}, {"track_id": "track_acoustic_folk", "score": 7.5, "rationale": "Nostalgic folk variant works for the same content but reads slightly heavier than the actual mood — the clips are calm, not specifically memory-tinged.", "predicted_strengths": ["tender mood still fits cat/book clips", "slow pacing supports the clip lengths"]}, {"track_id": "track_pop_neon", "score": 1.2, "rationale": "Peaks_high neon nightlife pop is the inverse of slow morning calm — wrong energy, wrong pacing, wrong tonal universe entirely.", "predicted_strengths": ["no real fit"]}]}
